parsed_review.summary: CP00-759 (RP25 Migration Platform service foundation, Risk C, 150 units, RP25.P01.M06.S05-RP25.P02.M02.S22) is a clean descriptor-only governance pack and its evidence supports the eventual production_ready (descriptor-verified) promotion that is currently, and correctly, withheld pending this read-only review receipt. Verification performed via Read/Grep/Glob only: (1) Implementation in packages/migration/src/{registry,service,validators,import-plan,mappers,index}.js builds deep-frozen descriptor objects with no runtime execution, no product-state writes, and no stubs/TODOs; MIGRATION_PLATFORM_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION applies descriptor_only/no_real_data/synthetic_only and all source-system runtime flags (file_server/sharepoint/google_drive/imanage/import) false. (2) Coverage matches the pack baseline exactly — deliverable_distribution {implementation:77,ui:23,fixture:4,test:20,hermes_evidence:4,claude_review:7,contract:3,security_audit:6,failure_recovery:6}=150 and micro_title_distribution {Synthetic Fixture Set:16,Test And Golden Case Set:22,Hermes Evidence Packet:20,Claude Review Packet:20,Closeout And Next Handoff:10,Scope Inventory:20,Contract Draft:20,Type And Shape Definition:22}=150, all RP25, monotonic IDs, first/last unit and risk/unit_count aligned with binding. (3) Tests are genuine: node --test migration model.test.js = 13 pass/0 fail; full npm test = 2961 pass/0 fail; all required validation commands (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) recorded exit_code 0. (4) contracts/migration-platform-contract.json regenerated deterministically by scripts/validate-rp25-migration-platform-contract.mjs with validation.valid:true, latest_pack CP00-759, CP756-758 retained as historical projections. (5) No real client/matter/credential/secret data found in the migration package. (6) Authority boundary correct: descriptor authority_boundary has claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-760; Claude review packets read_only:true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false; Hermes packets emit_runtime_receipt:false / writes_product_state:false (deterministic control-plane review/evidence handling only, not embedded product runtime). (7) CP178+ hardening satisfied: readiness auth_preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON (1436 bytes, exit 0), and the pack's forbidden_review_evidence list rejects not_logged_in/malformed_json/usage_limit/tool_call_shaped_output/zero_byte_stdout/fenced_json_with_prose. manifest.json, command-evidence.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, and the pending claude-review-result.json are all present and internally consistent (status in_progress, production_ready:false, review_receipt_ref:null) awaiting exactly this receipt. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not the final approval authority, which is the expected boundary and does not block this CP closeout.
